div.h1: Scenario 5 — running claude from a nested subdir skips the parent's .claude/

div.p: Gotcha: rules at with-sandbox/.claude/ cover with-sandbox/ but not with-sandbox/nested/.
Fix: put .claude/settings.json in every dir you run Claude from, or run Claude from the dir that holds the rules. Run /status to verify what loaded.
No .claude/ here. Claude picks a single project scope per session — it does not walk up merging every enclosing .claude/ it finds.
Sandbox config lives in the same settings file — so the OS-level denyRead wall also isn't active from nested/. Both defenses vanish together.
